insight: Foundation's Remain.runTaskAsync() on Folia used getGlobalRegionScheduler() which runs on the server thread — not async. Fixed by using getAsyncScheduler() with tick-to-ms conversion (ticks * 50L, TimeUnit.MILLISECONDS). Discord.java's .complete() calls were also changed to non-blocking .queue() as defense-in-depth.

On Folia/ShreddedPaper, Foundation's `Remain.runTaskAsync()` used `getGlobalRegionScheduler()` which runs on the server thread, not async. This caused blocking calls (like Discord REST `.complete()`) scheduled via `Platform.runTaskAsync()` to freeze the server. The fix uses `getAsyncScheduler()` with tick-to-ms conversion (`ticks * 50L, TimeUnit.MILLISECONDS`).
